title: Steam Angel roll-six locks Legendary and Mythic cards

card.rawText: During your turn, roll 1 die. For 1 turn cycle, the following rarity cards cannot be played: 1-3 Epic/Promo. 4-6 Legendary/Mythic.

effect.value: During your turn, roll 1 die. For 1 turn cycle, the following rarity cards cannot be played: 1-3 Epic/Promo. 4-6 Legendary/Mythic.

plan.title: Steam Angel roll-six locks Legendary and Mythic cards
